article_items.title: Announcing OpenAI-compatible API support for Amazon SageMaker AI endpoints | Amazon Web Services
article_items.description: Today, Amazon SageMaker AI introduces OpenAI-compatible API support for real-time inference endpoints. If you use the OpenAI SDK, LangChain, or Strands Agents, you can now invoke models on SageMaker AI by changing only your endpoint URL. You don’t need a custom client, a SigV4 wrapper, or code rewrites. Overview With this launch, SageMaker AI endpoints […]

Artificial Intelligence Announcing OpenAI-compatible API support for Amazon SageMaker AI endpoints Today, Amazon SageMaker AI introduces OpenAI-compatible API support for real-time inference endpoints. If you use the OpenAI SDK, LangChain, or Strands Agents, you can now invoke models on SageMaker AI by changing only your endpoint URL. With this launch, SageMaker AI endpoints expose an /openai/v1 path that accepts Chat Completions requests and returns responses as is from the container, including streaming. OpenAI endpoints are turned on for all endpoints and inference components using standard SageMaker AI APIs and SDK.
key_points: If you use the OpenAI SDK, LangChain, or Strands Agents, you can now invoke models on SageMaker AI by changing only your endpoint URL.

Artificial Intelligence Announcing OpenAI-compatible API support for Amazon SageMaker AI endpoints Today, Amazon SageMaker AI introduces OpenAI-compatible API support for real-time inference endpoints.
With this launch, SageMaker AI endpoints expose an /openai/v1 path that accepts Chat Completions requests and returns responses as is from the container, including streaming.

article_items.title: 100 things we announced at I/O 2026
article_items.description: This year at Google I/O 2026, we announced Gemini Omni, Google Antigravity, Universal Cart and so much more. Here are the highlights.
article_items.excerpt: This year at Google I/O 2026, we announced Gemini Omni, Google Antigravity, Universal Cart and so much more. Here are the highlights.
article_items.summary: 100 things we announced at I/O 2026. This year at Google I/O 2026, we announced Gemini Omni, Google Antigravity, Universal Cart and so much more. Here’s a rundown of the top announcements, launches and demos at I/O 2026. This week at Google I/O 2026, we unveiled new models, agents and tools to help you build, search, create, discover, shop and get more done. Create and build with our most advanced models 1. We launched Gemini 3.5 Flash : the first in our latest series of models combining frontier intelligence with action. Gemini 3.5 Flash delivers intelligence that rivals large flagship models at speeds you expect from the Flash series. It outperforms Gemini 3.1 Pro on challenging coding and agentic benchmarks like Terminal-Bench 2.1 (76.2%), GDPval-AA (1656 Elo) and MCP Atlas (83.6%). Building on the strong multimodal foundation of Gemini 3, 3.5 Flash generates richer, more interactive web UIs and graphics. It combines Gemini’s intelligence with the best of our generative media models for a new level of world understanding, multimodality and editing.
key_points: This year at Google I/O 2026, we announced Gemini Omni, Google Antigravity, Universal Cart and so much more.
Here’s a rundown of the top announcements, launches and demos at I/O 2026.
This week at Google I/O 2026, we unveiled new models, agents and tools to help you build, search, create, discover, shop and get more done.
Create and build with our most advanced models 1.
We launched Gemini 3.5 Flash : the first in our latest series of models combining frontier intelligence with action.
Gemini 3.5 Flash delivers intelligence that rivals large flagship models at speeds you expect from the Flash series.
It outperforms Gemini 3.1 Pro on challenging coding and agentic benchmarks like Terminal-Bench 2.1 (76.2%), GDPval-AA (1656 Elo) and MCP Atlas (83.6%).
Building on the strong multimodal foundation of Gemini 3, 3.5 Flash generates richer, more interactive web UIs and graphics.
